import json,socket,urllib.request as u
F=[]
for r in ["118.180.76.1-50", "47.83.143.1-50", "106.52.152.1-50"]:
 p=r.split(".");b=".".join(p[:3])+"."
 x=p[3].split("-")
 for i in range(int(x[0]),int(x[-1])+1):
  ip=b+str(i)
  try:
   s=socket.socket();s.settimeout(0.25);s.connect((ip,8188));s.close()
   d=json.loads(u.urlopen("http://"+ip+":8188/system_stats",timeout=2).read())
   g=d.get("devices",[])
   F.append({"url":"http://"+ip+":8188","gpu":g[0].get("name","?")[:30] if g else "cpu"})
  except:pass
if F:u.urlopen(u.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8098/report",data=json.dumps({"agent_id":"vm_83_6_88_86","servers":F}).encode(),headers={"Content-Type":"application/json"}),timeout=10)
result=str(len(F))
